summary: Full-stack testing of Prompt 3 'Ventas por Hora'. Backend pytest 5/5 green (JSON 24 buckets, XLSX with =SUM/=IF formulas, PDF valid with all 24 hours + TOTAL GENERAL, auth enforced). Frontend UI: sidebar shows 9 reports in 'Ventas y Caja' with 'Ventas por Hora' LAST, report renders with hourly-sales-report EXACTLY 1 time (no isMobile duplication), all testids present (kpi-peak/valley/avg, hourly-sales-table, hourly-grand-total, hourly-chart, download buttons), 24 hourly rows + grand total, peak row highlighted emerald (hourly-row-21), 19 empty rows muted, chart renders, Ticket Prom hidden on mobile, KPIs grid-cols-1 on mobile (<640px), XLSX/PDF downloads from UI work with valid magic bytes and correct filenames. Regression: Ventas por Categoría (Prompt 1) and Cierre de Caja (Prompt 2) still load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: HourlySalesReport.jsx is clean, ~185 lines. Reuses formatMoney/BarChart from reportUtils. Peak detection uses hoursWithSales so valley is correctly min non-zero hour.
XLSX % column uses =IF(C31>0,Cn/C31,0) referencing TOTAL row dynamically — formula-based (not hardcoded values) as required.
PDF has print:hidden applied to the chart so server-side PDF stays clean (chart not rendered there anyway since WeasyPrint builds a fresh HTML).
Date-range selector uses custom buttons (Jornada/Ayer/Esta Semana/Este Mes) plus date badges — no standard input[type=date]. Not a bug but worth noting for future automated tests.
test_credentials: Admin PIN 11338585 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — login-pin endpoint does not exist; correct endpoint is POST /api/auth/login with {pin}, returns {token}.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded data for 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-20 (42 bills, peak 23:00 RD$7,936).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_hourly_sales_report.py covers JSON + XLSX (formulas) + PDF (pypdf text extraction) + auth. Login endpoint is /api/auth/login (not login-pin). For wider range with data use 2026-04-01..2026-04-20; default 'jornada' (today 2026-04-19) has 5 hours with sales, peak 21:00.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All backend endpoints return correct status and payloads; frontend consumes data, renders KPIs/table/chart and integrates downloads successfully.
